root.rep_text: รายงานการถอนหุ้น โอนหุ้น แยกประเภท

withdraw_date.text: เริ่มวันที่

combo.trans_type: 1=ถอนหุ้น/2=โอนหุ้นให้ผู้รับผลประโยชน์/3=โอนหุ้นให้ผู้อื่น/4=ถอนหุ้นบางส่วน

root.sql: SELECT substr(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no),1,100) as member_name, (case sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.trans_type when 'SWW' then 'ถอนหุ้น'when 'SWG' then 'โอนหุ้นให้ผู้รับผลประโยชน์' when 'SWT' then 'โอนหุ้นให้ผู้อื่น' end )as trans_type_1, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.membership_recieve , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_withdraw , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.trans_type FROM sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.withdraw_doc_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no ) /*and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date between :adtm_datefrom and :adtm_dateto )*/ and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status = '0' ) /*and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.trans_type = :as_type)*/ /*WHERE*/
